title: Composable Tool Pipeline
constraints: The monolithic tool must be broken into at least 4 small, single-purpose tools
Each small tool must be independently usable by the agent
The agent must be able to compose tools into different pipelines depending on the query
No tool should duplicate logic from another
hints: Identify the distinct stages in the monolithic function: fetch, clean, analyze, format — each becomes its own tool
Design each tool to accept and return a consistent data format so they snap together like LEGO bricks
In LangGraph, model the pipeline as a dynamic graph where the agent decides which tools to chain based on the query

starterCode.langgraph:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.tools import tool
from langgraph.prebuilt import create_react_agent

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: This monolithic tool does everything — fetch, clean, analyze, and format.
# It's impossible to reuse individual steps or compose different pipelines.
# TODO: Break into small composable tools and build a dynamic LangGraph pipeline.

@tool
def process_data(source: str, analysis_type: str) -> str:
    """Fetch data from source, clean it, analyze it, and format a report."""
    raw_data = f"Raw data from {source}: [revenue: $10M, costs: $6M, employees: 500, growth: 15%, region: US, founded: 2010]"
    cleaned = raw_data.replace("[", "").replace("]", "").strip()
    if analysis_type == "financial":
        analysis = "Profit margin: 40%, Revenue per employee: $20K, Healthy financials."
    elif analysis_type == "growth":
        analysis = "15% YoY growth, above industry average of 10%. Strong trajectory."
    else:
        analysis = "General overview: mid-size company with solid fundamentals."
    report = f"=== Report for {source} ===\nData: {cleaned}\nAnalysis: {analysis}\n=================="
    return report

agent = create_react_agent(llm, [process_data])

result = agent.invoke({"messages": [("human", "Get financial data for Acme Corp and analyze their growth")]})
print(result["messages"][-1].content)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM
from crewai.tools import tool

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: This monolithic tool does everything — fetch, clean, analyze, and format.
# It's impossible to reuse individual steps or compose different pipelines.
# TODO: Break into small composable tools.

@tool
def process_data(source: str, analysis_type: str) -> str:
    """Fetch data from source, clean it, analyze it, and format a report."""
    raw_data = f"Raw data from {source}: [revenue: $10M, costs: $6M, employees: 500, growth: 15%, region: US, founded: 2010]"
    cleaned = raw_data.replace("[", "").replace("]", "").strip()
    if analysis_type == "financial":
        analysis = "Profit margin: 40%, Revenue per employee: $20K, Healthy financials."
    elif analysis_type == "growth":
        analysis = "15% YoY growth, above industry average of 10%. Strong trajectory."
    else:
        analysis = "General overview: mid-size company with solid fundamentals."
    report = f"=== Report for {source} ===\nData: {cleaned}\nAnalysis: {analysis}\n=================="
    return report

agent = Agent(
    role="Data Analyst",
    goal="Analyze data for users",
    backstory="You are a data analyst assistant.",
    tools=[process_data],
    llm=llm,
)

task = Task(
    description="Get financial data for Acme Corp and analyze their growth",
    expected_output="A data analysis report",
    agent=agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

# BUG: This monolithic tool does everything — fetch, clean, analyze, and format.
# It's impossible to reuse individual steps or compose different pipelines.
# TODO: Break into small composable tools.

@function_tool
def process_data(source: str, analysis_type: str) -> str:
    """Fetch data from source, clean it, analyze it, and format a report."""
    raw_data = f"Raw data from {source}: [revenue: $10M, costs: $6M, employees: 500, growth: 15%, region: US, founded: 2010]"
    cleaned = raw_data.replace("[", "").replace("]", "").strip()
    if analysis_type == "financial":
        analysis = "Profit margin: 40%, Revenue per employee: $20K, Healthy financials."
    elif analysis_type == "growth":
        analysis = "15% YoY growth, above industry average of 10%. Strong trajectory."
    else:
        analysis = "General overview: mid-size company with solid fundamentals."
    report = f"=== Report for {source} ===\nData: {cleaned}\nAnalysis: {analysis}\n=================="
    return report

agent = Agent(
    name="Data Analyst",
    instructions="You are a data analyst assistant. Help users analyze data.",
    tools=[process_data],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Get financial data for Acme Corp and analyze their growth")
print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Monolith is decomposed
evaluationCriteria.description: The single process_data tool is broken into at least 4 independent, single-purpose tools

evaluationCriteria.label: Tools are composable
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent can chain tools in different orders depending on the query

evaluationCriteria.label: Each tool works independently
evaluationCriteria.description: Any single tool can be called on its own without requiring the full pipeline

evaluationCriteria.label: Output is still correct
evaluationCriteria.description: The decomposed pipeline produces the same quality of analysis as the monolithic version
